Description: Health check endpoint. Returns the current status of the Nokia Schedular API service.
Output Format: JSON object with status and service name

Description: List all sites with gantt chart data. Supports filtering by region, market, site_id, vendor, area, and user_id with pagination.
Input Parameters: Query Params: region (string, optional), market (string, optional), site_id (string, optional), vendor (string, optional), area (string, optional), user_id (string, optional), limit (int, optional, default=50), offset (int, optional, default=0)
Output Format: JSON object with count, sites array, and pagination info

Description: Dashboard summary for a user. Returns aggregated site status counts and on-track percentage based on user's saved filter preferences.
Output Format: JSON object with dashboard summary statistics

Description: Get all distinct region values from the database. Used to populate region filter dropdowns.
Get all distinct market values from the database. Used to populate market filter dropdowns.
Get all distinct area values (m_area column) from the database. Used to populate area filter dropdowns.
Get all distinct site ID values from the database. Used to populate site filter dropdowns.
Output Format: JSON array of site ID strings

Description: Get all distinct vendor values from the database. Used to populate vendor filter dropdowns.
List all prerequisite/milestone definitions ordered by sort_order. Each prerequisite is enriched with its dependency graph (preceding and following milestones).
Get a single prerequisite/milestone definition by its ID. Returns the prerequisite enriched with dependency information.
List all constraint thresholds ordered by type then sort_order. Used for milestone and overall site status color-coding rules.
List only milestone-level constraint thresholds. Filters thresholds where constraint_type is 'milestone'.
List only overall site-level constraint thresholds. Filters thresholds where constraint_type is 'overall'.
Get a single constraint threshold by its ID.
Create a new constraint threshold. Validates percentage ranges and prevents duplicate entries.
Input Parameters: Request Body: constraint_type (string, default="milestone"), name (string, required), status_label (string, required), color (string, required), min_pct (float, default=0), max_pct (float, optional), sort_order (int, default=0)

Description: Update an existing constraint threshold. Supports partial updates and validates percentage logic.
Input Parameters: Path Params: constraint_id (int, required). Request Body: name (string, optional), status_label (string, optional), color (string, optional), min_pct (float, optional), max_pct (float, optional), sort_order (int, optional)

Description: Delete a constraint threshold by its ID.
Get all distinct por_plan_type values from the staging table. Used to populate plan type filter options.
Output Format: JSON array of plan type strings

Description: Get all distinct por_regional_dev_initiatives values from the staging table. Used to populate regional dev initiatives filter options.
Output Format: JSON array of regional dev initiative strings

Description: Save or update gate check filter selections for a user. Upserts the UserFilter row with plan_type_include and regional_dev_initiatives.
Input Parameters: Request Body: user_id (string, required), plan_type_include (list[string], optional), regional_dev_initiatives (string, optional)

Description: Get saved gate check selections for a specific user. Returns 404 if no gate checks are saved.
AI-powered chat interface. Maintains conversation history per user_id and returns recommended API endpoints and parameters for the frontend to call.
Input Parameters: Query Params: user_id (string, required). Request Body: message (string, default="Give the current filters")
Input Example (JSON): {"message": "Show me all critical sites in Northeast region"}
Output Format: JSON object with assistant response (recommended endpoints and params)
Output Example (JSON): {"response": "Based on your request, I recommend calling the gantt-charts endpoint with region=Northeast filter.", "recommended_actions": [{"endpoint": "/api/v1/schedular/gantt-charts", "params": {"region": "Northeast"}}]}

Description: Get saved filter preferences for a specific user. Returns 404 if no filters are saved for the user.
Output Example (JSON): {"id": 1, "user_id": "user123", "region": "Northeast", "market": "NYC", "vendor": "Vendor A", "site_id": null, "area": null, "plan_type_include": "[\"New Build\"]", "regional_dev_initiatives": "2026 Build Plan"}

Description: Clear all saved filter preferences for a specific user.
Mark a prerequisite as skipped for the current user. Prevents duplicate skip entries.
List all skipped prerequisites for a specific user.
Un-skip a single prerequisite for a specific user. Restores the prerequisite to active state.
Input Parameters: Path Params: user_id (string, required), milestone_key (string, required)

Description: Un-skip all prerequisites for a specific user. Restores all prerequisites to active state.
Set or update the expected_days SLA override for a specific milestone for a user. Upserts the record.
Input Parameters: Path Params: user_id (string, required). Request Body: milestone_key (string, required), expected_days (int, required, >= 0)

Description: List all expected_days SLA overrides for a specific user.
Gantt chart using history-based SLA. Computes expected_days from historical actual dates within the specified date range.
Input Parameters: Query Params: date_from (string, YYYY-MM-DD, required), date_to (string, YYYY-MM-DD, required), region (string, optional), market (string, optional), site_id (string, optional), vendor (string, optional), area (string, optional), user_id (string, optional), limit (int, optional), offset (int, optional)
Output Format: JSON object with sla_type, date range, count, sites array, and pagination

Description: Clear all history_expected_days values from milestone_definitions table. Reverts all milestones to use default expected_days.
Output Example (JSON): {"detail": "History expected days cleared for all milestones."}

Description: Export gantt chart data as a downloadable CSV file. With user_id applies user's saved filters; without user_id exports all sites.
Output Example (JSON): CSV file with columns: site_id, project_id, project_name, market, region, milestone_key, milestone_name, planned_start, planned_finish, actual_finish, status, delay_days, overall_status, overall_progress

Description: Admin-only: Create a new prerequisite/milestone definition. Auto-syncs prereq_tails and handles dependency rewiring for insertion into the chain.
Input Parameters: Request Body: key (string, required), name (string, required), expected_days (int, default=0), start_gap_days (int, default=1), task_owner (string, optional), phase_type (string, optional), preceding_milestone_keys (list[string], optional), following_milestone_keys (list[string], optional), insert_after_key (string, optional), columns (list[MilestoneColumnCreate], default=[])

Description: Admin-only: Update an existing prerequisite/milestone definition. Supports partial updates and auto-syncs prereq_tails.
Input Parameters: Path Params: prerequisite_id (int, required). Request Body: name (string, optional), expected_days (int, optional), start_gap_days (int, optional), task_owner (string, optional), phase_type (string, optional)

Description: Admin-only: Globally skip a prerequisite. Sets is_skipped=True on the milestone definition affecting all users.
Admin-only: List all globally skipped prerequisites.
Admin-only: Un-skip a single prerequisite globally. Restores the prerequisite to active state for all users.
Admin-only: Un-skip all prerequisites globally. Restores all prerequisites to active state for all users.
